opening_technique: extreme close-up of a glowing primordial eye that suddenly expands into a cosmic battlefield
visual_motif: shifting celestial light patterns representing divine power
camera_language: use sweeping crane and dolly shots during exposition to convey grandeur; switch to handheld and quick whip pans during battle sequences to heighten chaos and intensity; locked off steady shots for moments of resolution and divine decree
forbidden_elements: modern or anachronistic props or costumes
slow static shots during battle scenes
overuse of text overlays or explanatory graphics
